description_long: This is a tall, freestanding coatrack made primarily of dark-stained wood with a classic, elegant design. The central vertical pole is topped with a rounded finial and features two tiers of outward-curving hooks, each tier containing multiple hooks for hanging coats, hats, or bags. The hooks are symmetrically arranged and have a smooth, slightly ornate curvature, providing ample space for multiple items. The base consists of three or four sturdy, curved legs that extend outward and downward, ensuring stability and balance. A circular ring near the base connects the legs, which may also serve as an umbrella holder or additional support. The overall finish is smooth and glossy, highlighting the wood grain and giving the coatrack a refined appearance suitable for entryways, lobbies, or waiting areas.
description: A tall, dark wood freestanding coatrack with multiple curved hooks and a stable, ornate base. It features a glossy finish and a classic, elegant design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of hooks and the rounded finial at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the hooks and the outward splay of the base legs.
description_view_2: Angled view revealing the layered arrangement of hooks and the circular support ring at the base.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back hooks and the full spread of the base legs.
